sections.heading: Mobile CMP/PPSE Approval Process
sections.bodyMd: Downloads & signs registration form and business review form to receive a contract and registration number.
sections.btgpayNote: Tap to Mobile e contactless exigem NFC estável, UX clara em caso de timeout ou anticolisão, e suporte a CDCVM quando o valor exigir verificação no dispositivo.

verification.evidence: Downloads & signs registration form and business review form to receive a contract and registration number.
